root.sql:
SELECT sc_rep_level_det.level_date, sc_rep_level_det.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_rep_level_det.balance_begin, sc_rep_level_det.pay_prin, sc_rep_level_det.pay_int, --sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.first_period as period_payment_amount, sc_rep_level_det.balance_forward, sc_rep_level_det.loan_contract_no, sc_rep_level_det.loan_code, sc_rep_level_det.last_access_date, sc_rep_level_det.last_calint_date, sc_rep_level_det.int_arrear, sc_rep_level_det.period_law, sc_rep_level_det.period_real, round(sc_rep_level_det.period_miss,0) as period_miss, sc_rep_level_det.amount_law, sc_rep_level_det.amount_real, sc_rep_level_det.amount_miss, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_rep_level_ucf.level_status, sc_rep_level_ucf.level_desc, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_rep_level_det.membership_no ) as membername, sc_rep_level_head.member_group_no, sc_rep_level_det.principal_arr ,case sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code when '0' then sc_rep_level_ucf.allowance_rate when '1' then sc_rep_level_ucf.allowance_rate else 100 end as allowance_rate ,sc_rep_level_det.int_arrear_in_year ,sc_rep_level_det.last_pay_prin ,sc_rep_level_det.last_pay_int ,sc_rep_level_det.share_amt ,sc_rep_level_det.dep_amt ,sc_rep_level_det.coll_amt
FROM sc_rep_level_det, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code, sc_rep_level_ucf, sc_rep_level_head WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_rep_level_det.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_rep_level_det.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and ( sc_rep_level_det.level_status = sc_rep_level_ucf.level_status ) and ( sc_rep_level_head.level_date = sc_rep_level_det.level_date ) and ( sc_rep_level_head.membership_no = sc_rep_level_det.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_rep_level_head.member_group_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_level_head.level_date = '31/7/2020' and ( sc_rep_level_det.amount_miss > 0 or ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code <> '0' and sc_rep_level_det.amount_miss = 0 ) ) /* and sc_rep_level_head.membership_no = '027179' */ order by sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ,sc_rep_level_ucf.level_status ,sc_rep_level_head.membership_no ,sc_rep_level_det.balance_forward desc
